title: Password
description: Protect your server with a password.
body:
![showcase screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1WrcGn3j/images/8b0eca89d84304f66465f0a73947487020985bf6.png)
**Players have to enter a password before they can connect to the server or even appear on the world.** The password can easily be changed in the config file and can be up to 128 characters long. Optionally, players that are whitelisted or operators don't have to enter the password when joining - this can be adjusted in the config file.
